title: To buy 2xx merch or to wait for the 3xx flood
display_title: To buy 2xx merch or to wait for the 3xx flood
wikitext:
[]: To buy 2.xx merch or to wait for the 3.xx flood?             Quote Post by LoCooLaidman » Wed Jul 25, 2012 8:49 pm So now that I've got money (and nothing to use it on and a burning love for NGE) I'm wondering whether I should go ahead and buy figures/other merchandise based on 2.xx (or older ones) over waiting for the imminent wave of 3.xx merch? I know that almost nothing will reach U.S shores (unless you order and what-not from Japan) for a couple years after 3.xx releases but still...

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Jul 25, 2012 11:54 pm I suggest that you ask yourself: 1) Am I just looking to get whatever merch strikes my fancy? or 2) Am I looking to start a focused, specialized collection? The gamut of what is Eva related has grown exponentially since the series originally came out and now it seems that the sky's the limit with what will be licensed. While this gives a collector plenty of options, unless perhaps your last name is Walton you can also go broke if you were to try and get everything under the sun. Certain types of merch also tend to appear more often than others both in brick and mortar stores and online and some items are more rare than others. You could import from Japan but that gets pricey very fast. I suggest that you look into what is and has been available and go for what interests you and looking ahead, what you will enjoy looking at, watching, reading, assembling, or posing as time goes by. Keep in mind too that the only person that the collection has to satisfy is yourself. As posted in the Official "Post your Evangelion collection" thread , some folks have impressive collections but those took a lot of time and money to put together. Everyone starts out at zero, so don’t feel that you need to play catch up. Speaking for myself, I became fan of the series early on so my preference leans more towards the older merch that was so hard to get at the time. After years of collecting I have decided to primarily focus on shitajiki and UCC Coffee cans, but am open to other things as well and have started to look into production cels. If you do decide to go for the older stuff there's a catalog called E-Mono which chronicles everything that was released from 1995 up through late 1997 that is both an excellent resource and inspiration for longing.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Thu Jul 26, 2012 12:09 am The problem is that who knows what new characters/mecha will be in 3.0? It's been known for a while that EVA-02 will be re-designated as EVA-02'β (read: EVA-02 prime beta) due to the extensive physical repairs done to it. There's also "Pirate Asuka" (with the eye patch and re-designed plugsuit), at least 3 chibi-Rei clones, and Eva-08 (of which we've only got a top-down overhead view of). Remember that's just from 45 seconds of preview footage (the 30 seconds at the end of 2.0, and the 15 seconds from the end of the NTV broadcast.) Surely there will be more surprises, and thus more merchandise thereof.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 26, 2012 2:14 pm It's Evangelion merchandise. It almost doesn't matter. (Almost...)
